programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Alubarna Grieves! The Fierce Captain Karoo

programme.title: Usopp finally shows some courage by using a five-ton hammer to play whack-a-mole with Miss Merry Christmas. He may be bluffing, but the distraction lets Chopper zero in on the enemy’s weakness.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sworn on a Friend's Dream! The Battle of Molehill, Block 4

programme.title: Chopper’s Rumble Ball could be the difference between life and death in the mole ballgame. Elsewhere, Sanji has trouble kicking a pretty enemy, and Vivi proposes something unthinkable.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Big Opening Day Today! The Copy-Copy Montage

programme.title: Vivi continues preparations to blow up the palace; Zorro puts his steel to the test against a lethal blade-man; Sanji tries to overcome his inability to kick a foxy lady!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Transformed into Nami! Bon Clay's Rapid-Fire Ballet Kenpo!

programme.title: Things don’t look good for the prettiest Straw Hat. Nami’s about to tangle with a thorny adversary, and the weapon Usopp built her is only good for party tricks!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Nami's Cyclone Advisory! Clima Tact Burst!

programme.title: Crocodile reveals his sinister motives for attacking Alabasta, and Nami tries to end her duel with Miss Doublefinger by unleashing the Clima Tact’s ultimate weapon: a devastatingly lethal tornado!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Secret Passed Down In The Royal Family! The Ancient Weapon Pluton!

programme.title: Zoro hopes to attain a new level of strength when he fights a foe with a body made of blades. The Straw Hat sword-slinger is determined to become a man who can cut steel – or die trying.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Secret Of Powerful Swordplay! Ability To Cut Steel And The Rhythm Things Have!

programme.title: Koza – the leader of the rebel army – finally discovers the evil mastermind behind Alabasta’s drought, but is he too late to prevent further bloodshed?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Battle is Over! Koza Raises the White Flag!

programme.title: When Koza is mysteriously shot, the rebellion is reborn, but Vivi’s cries for a cease-fire fall on deaf ears until a long-overdue hero swoops to the rescue!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Where Vivi's Voice Gets Heard! The Hero Descends!

programme.title: Luffy finally discovers the secret to knocking out a sandman, but it won’t matter unless Vivi and the rest of the Straw Hats can locate the Baroque Works bomber.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sand Croc and Water Luffy!... The Second Round of the Duel!

programme.title: While his mates search for a bomb, Luffy narrowly survives his second scrape with Crocodile. Across town, Nico Robin strong-arms Cobra into revealing his country’s greatest secret.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: That Looks Croc-ish!... Luffy, Run to the Royal Tomb!

programme.title: With the walls crumbling down around them, Crocodile attacks Luffy with a poisoned pirate hook. Meanwhile, Vivi draws a bead on the bombers, but can she stop them in time?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Nightmare Draws Near!... This is the Sand-Sand Clan's Secret Base

programme.title: The Straw Hats team up to give Vivi one last shot at disarming the bomb that threatens to destroy her city. She succeeds in cutting the fuse, but Crocodile has a backup plan.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Magnificent Wings! My Name is Pell, Guardian Deity of the Country

programme.title: Pell’s sacrifice spares his beloved city, but only an act of god can stop the rebellion. With Crocodile’s poison coursing through his body, Luffy musters a final attack against Alabasta’s oppressor.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I Will Surpass You! Rain Falls in Alabasta.

programme.title: Crocodile is defeated, the rain has returned to Alabasta, and Vivi’s people are eager to rebuild their kingdom. As for the Straw Hats, they have a fleet of marines breathing down their necks.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Farewell to Arms! Pirates and Different Ideas of Justice!

programme.title: Now that the rebellion is over, Vivi must make an important decision about her future. The Straw Hats are ready to hoist the anchor, but an ambiguous villain has stolen the Going Merry!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Pirates' Banquet And Operation Escape From Alabasta!

programme.title: Mr. 2 is a man of many faces, but he finally shows his true colors when the marines attack the Straw Hats. Elsewhere, Vivi has a scheme up her sleeve, and it involves Igaram wearing a dress.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: It All Started On That Day...! Vivi Tells The Story Of Her Adventure!

programme.title: Luffy and his crew watch Alabasta fade into the distance, but there’s no time for reminiscing. The marines are in hot pursuit, and there’s a stowaway aboard the Going Merry!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Scent of danger! The seventh member is Nico Robin!

programme.title: Fresh off their adventure Alabasta, the Straw Hats discover an isolated island where they can restock their food supply. Chopper is left to guard the ship, but he and Nico spend the afternoon exploring instead!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The First Patient! The Untold Story Of The Rumble Ball!

programme.title: When a mail-order salesman gets lost at sea, Nami finds the paper she needs to start making maps. If the Straw Hat crew can somehow manage to survive a deadly cyclone, she might actually get some use out of it!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Uprising of the Navigator! For the Unyielding Dream!

programme.title: Heavy fog leads to a close encounter of the culinary kind when Nico fishes a marine out of the drink. The aspiring chef is concerned about the quality of his curry, and Sanji is just the guy to refine his recipe!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Recipe Handed Down! Sanji, the Iron Man of Curry

programme.title: A break in the rain provides the perfect opportunity for Usopp to help a young girl fulfill her dream of launching the world’s largest firework.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I Will Make It Bloom! Usopp The Man And The Eight-Foot Shell!

programme.title: The 6th Day, (2000, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In the very near future, cattle, fish, and even the family pet can be cloned. But cloning humans is illegal - that is, until family man Adam Gibson comes home from work one day to find a clone has replaced him. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Overlord, (2018, Military & War Action)
programme.desc: Nothing can prepare you for the mind-blowing mayhem that is Overlord. Mega producer J.J. Abrams creates an insanely twisted thrill ride about a team of American troops who come face-to-face with Nazi super-soldiers unlike the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Minority Report, (2002, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: Total Recall, (1990, Science fiction)
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: xXx: State of the Union, (2005, Espionage Action)
programme.desc: Darius Stone is a thrill-seeking troublemaker whose criminal record and extreme sports obsession make him the perfect candidate to be the newest xXx agent. He must save the U.S. government from a conspiracy led by Secretary of Defense George Deckert.

programme.title: Salt, (2010, Espionage Action)
programme.desc: Evelyn Salt swore an oath to duty, honor, and country. She will prove loyal to these when a defector accuses her of being a Russian sleeper spy. Salt goes on the run, using all her skills and years of experience as a covert operative to elude capture.

programme.title: Minority Report, (2002, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: Total Recall, (1990, Science fiction)
programme.desc: It's 2084 A.D. and Doug Quaid is haunted by recurring dreams about journeying to Earths closest planetary neighbor, Mars.

programme.title: Night Stage To Galveston, (1952, Drama)
programme.desc: Gene Autry and Pat Buttram work for a newspaper publisher, and find evidence of corruption in the Texas State Police. The publisher’s daughter is kidnapped to prevent the story from being published.

programme.title: Apache Country, (1952, Drama)
programme.desc: Cavalry scouts Gene Autry & Pat Buttram are ordered to break up a ring which uses raids to cover up its activities. Carolina Cotton assists Gene and Pat, while seeking revenge against the gang leader.

programme.title: The Cowboy and the Lady, (1938, Drama)
programme.desc: A lonely socialite masquerades as a maid and meets an unpretentious, plain-spoken cowboy who is unaware of her true identity.

programme.title: The Way West, (1967, Drama)
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: Gunfight At The O.K. Corral, (1957, Drama)
programme.desc: Frontier lawman Wyatt Earp joins his three brothers in their feud against the villainous Clanton gang, a local clan of cattle thieves in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Red River, (1948, Drama)
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Rio Lobo, (1970, Drama)
programme.desc: This fifth and final collaboration between John Wayne and director Howard Hawks is an action-filled Western set after the Civil War, in which a group of men seek out Union traitors responsible for a string of train robbers.

programme.title: High Noon, (1951, Drama)
programme.desc: Gary Cooper won the Oscar for the Best Actor in this classic tale of a lawman who stands alone to defend a town of cowardly citizens against a gang of revenge-seeking criminals.

programme.title: Man of the West, (1958, Drama)
programme.desc: Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: Brotherhood of the Wolf, (2001, Foreign Action & Adventure)
programme.desc: In 18th-century France, the Chevalier de Fronsac and his Native American friend Mani are sent to the Gevaudan province at the king's behest to investigate the killings of hundreds by a mysterious beast.

programme.title: Southland Tales, (2006, Science fiction)
programme.desc: SOUTHLAND TALES is an ensemble piece set in the futuristic landscape of Los Angeles, as it stands on the brink of social, economic and environmental disaster. Boxer Santaros (Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson) is an action star who's stricken with amnesia.

programme.title: Bewitched (2005), (2002, Comedy)
programme.desc: A has-been actor tries to convince the perfect woman to play Samantha in an adaptation of the classic TV series; a woman who, unbeknownst to him, really is a witch!

programme.title: Brotherhood of the Wolf, (2001, Foreign Action & Adventure)
programme.desc: In 18th-century France, the Chevalier de Fronsac and his Native American friend Mani are sent to the Gevaudan province at the king's behest to investigate the killings of hundreds by a mysterious beast.

programme.title: Eagle Eye, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: Spy Kids, (2001, Adventure)
programme.desc: Super-spies Gregorio (Antonio Banderas) and Ingrid (Carla Gugino) give up their lives of intrigue to raise their children. After a sinister super-villain kidnaps the parents, it's up to the kids to come to the rescue.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams, (2003, Adventure)
programme.desc: In the sequel, the OSS now has a full child-spy section and our hero siblings Carmen and Juni Cortez have become agents. On a mission to recover a dangerous device that threatens the entire world, they enlist the skills of their family.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Galaxia is revealed to be the Legendary Sailor Guardian who sealed away Chaos. She has become corrupt and has gone on to conquer the galaxy herself.
programme.sub-title: The Light of Hope: The Final Battle for the Galaxy

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: As Galaxia closes in to take Sailor Moon’s star seed, the Light of Hope reveals itself. The Light of Hope begs Usagi to use its power to stop Galaxia.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Love: The Moonlight Illuminates the Galaxy

programme.title: Sailor Moon R: The Movie
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the Sailor Guardians unite to save Earth from an alien force!

programme.title: Sailor Moon S: The Movie
programme.desc: Princess Snow Kaguya has a chilling plan to freeze Earth. Sailor Moon and her team are now the only hope!

programme.title: Sailor Moon Super S: The Movie
programme.desc: The evil Queen plots to trap Earth in a energy field, powered by the dreams of children. Sailor Moon and the Sailor Guardians must now save the world!

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi Tsukino is a schoolgirl who meets a talking cat named Luna. Usagi is transformed into Sailor Moon, the guardian who fights for love and justice.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A house of fortune opens up and gains popularity for its predictions. The customers begin to act violent. Usagi and Luna decide to investigate.
programme.sub-title: Punishment Awaits: The House Of Fortune Is The Monster Mansion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls in town are tuning in to a radio program that reads out love letters. A sleeping sickness is plaguing the town that puts people to sleep.
programme.sub-title: The Mysterious Sleeping Sickness: Protect the Girls In Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi is shocked to find out that she’s gained weight from too much eating. Determined to get back into shape, Usagi and her friends join a gym.
programme.sub-title: Learn How to Be Skinny from Usagi

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shingo brings home a pet Chanela. Shingo becomes so absorbed in the Chanela that he stops going to school, which worries Usagi.
programme.sub-title: Scent of a Monster: Chanela Will Steal Your Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi bumps into Yusuke Amade, a famous musician who claims he is being chased by a monster. Usagi and Luna decide to keep an eye on Yusuke.
programme.sub-title: Protect the Melody of Love: Usagi Plays Cupid

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Naru dream of becoming famous like Mikan Shiratori. When the girls hear that Mikan is hosting a talent contest, they see their chance.
programme.sub-title: Usagi Learns Her Lesson: Becoming a Star Is Hard Work

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi befriends Ami Mizuno, the school’s smartest girl. But Luna, who senses an unknown energy coming from Ami, suspects her of being a Monster.
programme.sub-title: The Girl Genius Is a Monster: The Brainwashing Cram School of Horror

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Ami find a clock that resembles Luna. That night, the clock emits a strange light that causes Usagi to become very impatient.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Disaster: Beware of the Clock of Confusion

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: People who take the bus near the Hikawa Shrine have started to go missing. Usagi and her friends decide to investigate.
programme.sub-title: The Cursed Bus: Enter Mars, the Guardian of Fire

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians go to the amusement park where visitors have gone missing. But Usagi is more focused on playing than finding the missing people.
programme.sub-title: Usagi vs. Rei: Nightmare in Dream Land

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rei goes off on a luxury cruise with Ami after winning tickets through the local lottery. Feeling left behind, Usagi sneaks aboard the ship.
programme.sub-title: I Want a Boyfriend: The Luxury Cruise Ship is a Trap

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Jadeite is given a warning by Queen Beryl, who can no longer tolerate the general’s failures. Jadeite challenges the Sailor Guardians to a showdown.
programme.sub-title: Girls Unite: The End of Jadeite

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Rui is a talented tennis player but Naru has noticed a dark change in her. Worried about their classmate, Naru and Usagi go to investigate.
programme.sub-title: A New Enemy Appears: Nephrite's Evil Crest

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami brings Usagi and Rei to her favorite park. Rei decides to have a date with Mamoru at the park before it closes down.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Juban District is having a contest to decide who can design the best wedding dress. Usagi, Rei, and all the girls in town compete.
programme.sub-title: A Girl's Dream: Usagi Becomes a Bride

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A photographer named Kijin Shinokawa holds a modeling contest. All the girls who have entered begin disappearing after Shinokawa photographs them!
programme.sub-title: Usagi's a Model: The Flash of the Monster Camera

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shingo’s friend Mika gives him a doll but Shingo unintentionally breaks the doll and hurts Mika’s feelings. Shingo decides to apologize.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi receives a love letter from Tuxedo Mask, stating that he’d like to meet her. She finds out that all the girls in town received the same letter.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Joy: A Love Letter from Tuxedo Mask

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls search for a vacation spot so they can focus on training. Instead, they settle on a mansion that has a very eerie service staff.
programme.sub-title: The Summer, the Beach, Youth and Ghosts

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami spots Nephrite and follows him to an animation studio that is making the Sailor V movie. Ami calls Usagi and Rei so they can investigate.
programme.sub-title: Protect the Children's Dreams: Friendship Through Anime

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Kingdom of Diamonds is hosting a party to reveal their treasure to the world. Both the Sailor Guardians and the Dark Kingdom crash the party.
programme.sub-title: Romance Under the Moon: Usagi's First Kiss

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Naru has fallen in love with Masato Sanjoin. Knowing that Sanjoin is really Nephrite, Usagi tries to convince Naru to give up on her feelings.
programme.sub-title: Wish upon a Star: Naru's First Love

programme.title: Killshot, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A veteran assassin (Mickey Rourke) and his young partner (Joseph Gordon-Levitt) pursue a couple (Diane Lane, Thomas Jane) who stumbled upon an extortion scheme and entered the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: Mud, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: On a Mississippi River island, two young friends (Tye Sheridan, Jacob Lofland) encounter a fugitive (Matthew McConaughey) whose wild tales about a beautiful woman and a line of bounty hunters come true.

programme.title: Buried, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Following an attack on his convoy in Iraq, a man (Ryan Reynolds) awakes in a coffin with little more than a lighter, a cell phone and his building anxiety.

programme.title: Wrecked, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A man (Adrien Brody) wakes up trapped in a car at the bottom of a cliff, with no memory of how he got there.

programme.title: Jungle, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A mysterious guide escorts an enthusiastic adventurer and his friend into the Amazon jungle. Their journey turns into a terrifying ordeal as the darkest elements of human nature and the deadliest threats of the wild force them to fight for survival.

programme.title: Beyond the Reach, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: In the Mojave Desert, a naked and unarmed hunting guide (Jeremy Irvine) runs from a wealthy hunter (Michael Douglas) who wants to ensure his silence in the death of an old man.

programme.title: The Road, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A father (Viggo Mortensen) and his son (Kodi Smit-McPhee) try to keep the dream of civilization alive as they wander through a post-apocalyptic landscape.

programme.title: Grace Of Monaco, (2015, Drama)
programme.desc: Academy Award®-winner Nicole Kidman captures the beauty and elegance of Grace Kelly in this true story of her transition from Hollywood starlet to Princess of Monaco.

programme.title: The Human Stain, (2003, Drama)
programme.desc: Coleman Silk (Hopkins) has a secret. A terrible fifty-year-old secret that the esteemed college professor has kept hidden from everyone including his wife, his children and his down-and-out young lover (Kidman)and it's about to ruin his entire life.

programme.title: Birthday Girl, (2002, Thriller)
programme.desc: A lonely bank employee, John Buckingham (Ben Chaplin) meets Nadia (Nicole Kidman) through a Russian mail-order bride service. Soon, the sudden arrival of Nadia's gregarious cousins makes John realize that he's in over his head.

programme.desc: Discovered by businessman Tim Daland, Cole is teamed with legendary crew chief and car-builder Harry Hogge to race for the Winston Cup at the Daytona 500. A crash nearly ends Cole’s career and he must turn to a beautiful doctor to regain his nerve.

programme.desc: When a train carrying atomic warheads crashes in the Soviet Union, nuclear specialist Dr. Kelly discovers the accident is really part of a plot to cover up the theft of the weapons.

programme.desc: Hajime and Yue learn about one another's stories as they descend deeper and deeper into the labyrinth.

programme.title: Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest
programme.desc: Hajime and Yue face a dangerous opponent who blocks their way out of the labyrinth.

programme.title: Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest
programme.desc: Hajime and Yue stumble upon a rare oasis deep inside the labyrinth and come face-to-face with the specter of the labyrinth's namesake.

programme.title: Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest
programme.desc: Upon reaching the surface, Hajime and Yue find a rabbit girl waiting for them.

programme.title: Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest
programme.desc: With their next labyrinth in sight, Hajime, Yue, and Shea continue onwards.

programme.title: Arifureta: From Commonplace to World's Strongest
programme.desc: Hajime and the gang accept a quest despite some reservations; they have an unexpected reunion with their teacher, Aiko, as they travel north to the town of Ur.

programme.title: I've Been Killing Slimes for 300 Years and Maxed Out My Level
programme.desc: Halkara throws a mushroom-grilling party, or shroompa, and accidentally includes some poisonous mushrooms that cause anyone who eats them to shrink.
programme.sub-title: I Ate a Mushroom and Turned Into a Child

programme.title: I've Been Killing Slimes for 300 Years and Maxed Out My Level
programme.desc: Festival season has come to the village of Flatta, and Azusa chooses to interact with the village tradition through a one-day-only coffee shop called The Witch's House.

programme.title: Backflip!!

Após passar muitos anos em um hospital psiquiátrico, ele volta ao bairro em que foi criado, na periferia de Londres. Lá, tenta recuperar as memórias que estão presas no seu subconsciente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Ralph Fiennes, Miranda Richardson, Gabriel Byrne, Lynn Redgrave, John Neville, Philip Craig, Bradley Hall, Gary Reineke, Sara Stockbridge, Cliff Saund... Diretor: David Cronenberg

programme.title: A Luz Divina, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Sol Harkins é o ateu mais famoso do mundo. Por sua opinião sempre contundente e muitas vezes polêmica, ele alcançou vários fãs e odiadores. Ele sofre um grave acidente que o deixa à beira da morte e vê todas as suas convicções sendo testadas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Ma ma, (1970)

programme.title: Guerreiros do Amanhã, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Sete jovens saem da cidade para passar um fim de semana inesquecível acampando no meio da natureza selvagem. Na volta, sua cidade já não é a mesma, suas famílias desapareceram, e eles são os únicos capazes de lutar para libertar seu povo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Filhos do Ódio, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Desafiando sua família, um jovem neto de líderes da Ku Klux Klan começa a questionar o racismo da sua cultura e lutar contra a injustiça social nos Estados Unidos da década de 1960. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Sangue na Veia, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante sua lua de mel no Caribe, um homem desaparece. Sem ajuda das autoridades locais, a esposa inicia uma busca incansável para encontrar os criminosos que levaram o seu marido. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: 6 Balas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após uma missão de resgate mal-sucedida, o mercenário Samson Gália decide abandonar tudo, até ser chamado para uma última missão cujo objetivo é resgatar a filha de um lutador de MMA muito conhecido. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Perseguição na Neve, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Veterano de guerra isolado na floresta encontra saco cheio de dinheiro durante caçada. Esconde rapidamente, mas não é o único que quer o dinheiro. Quando quatro criminosos armados chegam, o caçador vira presa. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Os Mercenários 2, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um grupo de mercenários se une para evitar que um criminoso roube abundância de plutônio, o que possibilitaria a produção de armas nucleares. Após o assassinato de um amigo e o sumiço do mapa que leva ao elemento, o grupo busca por vingança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Recruta Hollywood, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mega Valentine é uma estrela de cinema à beira da falência. Quando vê a chance de estrelar em um filme baseado no serviço militar, decide alistar-se no Exército para convencer o produtor da obra de que ela é a atriz ideal para o papel principal. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Blue Ridge: A série, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O dia tranquilo do Justin é arruinado quando uma abordagem policial leva a um incêndio criminoso e a descoberta chocante de uma rede criminosa mortal em Blue Ridge. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Blue Ridge: A série, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em busca de emoção, alguns aventureiros simulam um assalto ao estilo do Velho Oeste em uma estrada rural antiga, atraindo a atenção de Justin e sua equipe. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Blue Ridge: A série, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um divulgador de lutas sem escrúpulos é encontrado morto. Justin investiga o passado dele e descobre que quase todos que ele conhecia tinham motivo para matá-lo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Blue Ridge: A série, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O ônibus de uma banda country de vida árdua quebra, obrigando Justin a controlar a confusão que o segurança valentão deles começa causar por toda a cidade. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Blue Ridge: A série, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Quando uma treinadora de cavalos querida é assassinada, Justin descobre que o testamento dela contém uma mudança de última hora, o que pode ser a chave para elucidar a morte dela. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Blue Ridge: A série, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Quando Elli e Madde são feitas reféns, o desespero de Justin de manter sua família segura o leva a ficar preso com os reféns. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Linha do Condado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O xerife Alden Rockwell está se preparando para se aposentar, quando seu velho amigo de guerra é misteriosamente baleado. A esposa de Clint pressiona Alden para investigar o tiroteio, que aponta para um caso de corrupção e crime. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Força Letal, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O militar Karan Singh Dogra e o inspetor Bhavna Reddy correm contra o tempo para impedir um ataque terrorista. No entanto, eles logo percebem que decifrar a conspiração do mentor Buraq pode ser mais difícil do que eles imaginavam. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Hora do Acerto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O inspetor de polícia Wing e todo o seu time de policiais se tornam vítimas de uma gangue. Os policiais são brutalmente assassinados e um jovem é designado para ajudá-lo, mas a gangue volta a agir, iniciando uma aventura cheia de ação e vingança. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Os 800, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1937, oitocentos soldados chineses lutam sob cerco em Xangai, de um armazém no meio do campo de batalha, completamente cercado pelo exército japonês. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Garoto de Ouro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após dez anos na cadeia, um ex-campeão americano de luta livre tenta reconstruir sua vida longe dos ringues, mas se vê obrigado a lutar novamente para salvar a vida de um amigo que deve dinheiro a agiotas. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Jogo de Xadrez, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mina vai parar atrás das grades depois de um crime de corrupção. No entanto, o senador Franco, mandante do crime, usa de toda a sua influência para mantê-la na cadeia e abafar o caso. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Double Dragon, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O Shadow Master usa hologramas para enquadrar os Double Dragons por vários crimes, e o departamento de polícia de Metro City despacha um oficial robótico para prendê-los. Os dragões precisam provar sua inocência e salvar Metro City. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Perseguido pelo Destino, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O gângster Gigi conhece a jovem e rica corredora Bibi. Logo, os dois se apaixonam, mas devido a suas vidas distintas, a chance de ficarem juntos é remota. Eles iniciam um relacionamento que põe em risco suas próprias vidas. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Pessoa Sombria, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Os recém-casados Megan e Andrew acabaram de se mudar para a casa dos sonhos com aspirações de começar uma família. No entanto, eventos estranhos começam a acontecer. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Destino de Grace, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após prestar serviços militares, uma enfermeira retorna para a fazenda de sua avó em Amish Country, onde ela encontra um romance inesperado e se vê envolvida em um misterioso caso de assassinato. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Enquanto Houver Esperança, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Angélica é uma adolescente de 16 anos que luta contra uma forma rara de câncer. E, enquanto seus pais batalham para custear seu tratamento e ganhar mais tempo de vida para a garota, ela se apaixona pela primeira vez. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Onde Fica o Paraíso, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Durante a II Guerra Mundial, uma pesquisadora durona e solitária abriga um menino fugindo dos bombardeios em Londres. Aos poucos, ela acaba por abrir seu coração em uma emocionante jornada de amizade e imaginação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Eterna Namorada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Big Stone Gap é o lar de personagens charmosos e excêntricos. Ave Maria Mulligan, uma farmacêutica de 35 anos, é a solteirona da cidade. A vida de Ave vira de cabeça para baixo depois que ela descobre um segredo de família. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Colossal, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Gloria descobre que está conectada a uma criatura gigantesca que está destruindo Seul e deve descobrir por que a sua existência aparentemente insignificante tem um impacto tão colossal sobre o destino da Terra. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Magal e os Formigas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. João é um aposentado que está chateado com a vida. Viciado em loterias, ele nunca conseguiu ganhar dinheiro com isso. Um dia, porém, ele começa a receber visitas sobrenaturais do cantor Sidney Magal. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Embarque Imediato, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Wagner decide imigrar ilegalmente para Nova York, mas é impedido por Justina, supervisora do aeroporto. Sentindo-se culpada, ela se aproxima do rapaz, criando um forte laço entre os dois. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Submissão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dois fuzileiros voltam para casa após passarem por inúmeros traumas no confronto com Estado Islâmico. Eles buscam um novo caminho e, enquanto um tenta se recuperar de um vício, o outro reencontra o MMA. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Trumbo - Lista Negra, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Autor de algumas das histórias de maior sucesso da época, Dalton Trumbo foi preso e proibido de trabalhar. Mesmo quando saiu da prisão, demorou anos para vencer o boicote do governo, sofrendo com problemas envolvendo familiares e amigos próximos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Apex, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Cinco caçadores pagam para caçar um homem em uma ilha deserta, e acabam se tornando a presa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Sem Rastros, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois que uma menina desaparece de um parque de trailers, o pai e a mãe da garota decidem fazer justiça com as próprias mãos. A busca desesperada dos pais pela verdade acaba levando a uma revelação chocante. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Tráfico de Mulheres, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Três jovens mulheres, da América, da Nigéria e da Índia, são vítimas do tráfico de mulheres, sendo escravizadas para a prática de prostituição. O lucro pode ser de centenas de bilhões de dólares anualmente, superando o das maiores empresas do mundo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Delicadeza do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma bela jovem perde o marido em um terrível acidente. Inconsolável, ela decide mergulhar de cabeça no trabalho, se dedicando de forma integral. No entanto, um beijo sem motivo aparente em um colega muda essa situação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 2023. É o jogo do amor, quando o galã de Hollywood Jean-Claude Magnum desafia Mai para um duelo para ganhar sua mão em casamento! Será que Mai sucumbirá ao charme de Jean-Claude, para não mencionar sua esquadra de monstros-ninja? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E32

programme.title: 2023. É o primeiro dos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas, e Yugi luta contra o espírito maligno do Anel do Milênio, que possui Bakura! Yugi destrói os espectros grotescos de Bakura rapidamente, mas Bakura tem uma estratégia saída direto do cemitério... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Revelado o Espírito Escuro: Yugi vs. Bakura, Parte 1
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E33

programme.title: 2023. Bakura aciona a Tábua do Destino, que fará Yugi perder automaticamente em cinco turnos! Como se isso já não fosse ruim, o Santuário das Trevas de Bakura afeta os pontos de vida de Yugi a cada ataque! Incapaz de atacar e ficando sem tempo, Yugi está preso! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Revelado o Espírito Escuro: Yugi vs. Bakura, Parte 2
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E34

programme.title: 2023. Slifer, o Dragão Celeste de Yugi expelirá seu último sopro e vencerá o duelo, mas Bakura poderá não sobreviver a rajada do todo-poderoso Monstro Deus Egípcio! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Revelado o Espírito Escuro: Yugi vs. Bakura, Parte 3
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E35

programme.title: 2023. A origem das Cartas dos Deuses Egípcios é finalmente revelada! O misterioso Shadi leva Yugi a uma jornada de volta à criação de Duel Monsters... e os perigosos poderes com ela liberados! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E36

programme.title: 2023. No segundo dos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas, Odion, disfarçado de Marik, confunde Joey com várias armadilhas. No entanto, Joey tem Tornado Gigante, a defesa perfeita para a estratégia de Odion, que garante a vitória de Joey... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E37

Será que Joey pode usar eficientemente os monstros que ele ganhou antes, ou já está afobado demais para montar um contra-ataque bem-sucedido? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E38

programme.title: 2023. É uma verdadeira comilança, e a Serket de Odion devora os monstros de Joey, mutando para estágios de evolução mais e mais poderosos! Como Joey pode derrotar a Serket se ela engole os monstros de Joey quando eles são invocados? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E39

programme.title: 2023. Odion usa uma Carta Deus Egípcio falsa para invocar o terceiro Monstro Deus Egípcio, o Dragão Alado de Rá, e o usa para aniquilar o resto dos pontos de vida de Joey. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E40

programme.sub-title: Jogo de Mente: Mai vs. Marik, Parte 1

programme.title: 2009. A partida entre Raimon e Epsilon Remastered continua sua segunda metade. Embora eles tentem o seu melhor, Desarm é muito rápido e poderoso para eles. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: 2009. O retorno de Gouenji, juntamente com a vitória contra o Epsilon Remastered, elevaram o espírito de Raimon. Eles decidem voltar para casa para descansar. Mas assim que eles voltam, Diamond Dust quer que Raimon os enfrente em um jogo. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A escuridão congelante da poeira de diamante
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E53

programme.title: 2009. Alguém inesperado está aqui para se juntar a Raimon no meio da partida - Aphrodi! O rival de Raimon veio se juntar e lutar ao lado deles. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E54

programme.title: 2009. O técnico Hitomiko decide remover Endou como goleiro e pede que ele se torne um libero. Depois disso, Aphrodi se tornará um atacante e Tachimukai se tornará o novo goleiro de Raimon. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E55

programme.title: 2009. O Raimon Eleven chega a Teikoku para treinamento, conforme solicitado por Kidou. Kidou também pede que seus ex-colegas de equipe - o time Teikoku jogue um amistoso contra o Raimon com Endou, Kidou e Domon do lado de Teikoku. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E56

programme.title: 2010. Prominence e Diamond Dust se combinaram para se tornar a equipe mais forte do universo - The Chaos - e desafiam Raimon para um jogo. Este é o primeiro jogo que Raimon joga em sua nova formação. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E57

programme.title: 2010. Graças a Otomura, Kidou descobre como parar o ritmo do Caos. O fluxo do jogo é totalmente revertido, pois Raimon continua marcando sem parar. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E58

programme.title: 2010. Raimon exige que o treinador Hitomiko explique por que Gran a chamou de irmã, entre outras coisas. Ela promete explicar tudo depois que eles chegarem ao Monte Fuji. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E59

programme.title: 2010. Quando Raimon entra na Academia Aliea, sua verdade chocante é revelada: a Academia Aliea são crianças humanas cujas habilidades foram aprimoradas pelo meteorito Aliea. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E60

programme.title: 2010. A primeira metade da partida de Raimon contra o The Genesis começou. No entanto, ainda há mais um problema na equipe, e esse problema só pode ser respondido pela pessoa com um problema, Fubuki Shirou. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E61

programme.title: 2010. O Genesis rompeu com o evoluído Mugen The Hand, e assume a liderança mais uma vez. Irritado com a observação de Seijirou de que Raimon é o mesmo que Gênesis, Endou tenta furiosamente provar que ele está errado. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E62

programme.title: 2010. Raimon finalmente derrotou Gênesis e abre os olhos de Seijirou. Mas, no final, qual foi a verdadeira razão pela qual a Aliea Academy começou. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: O Raimon vs. Raimon se enfrentam
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E63

programme.title: 2010. O Raimon Eleven retorna à Raimon Junior High apenas para encontrar Ryūichi Kenzaki esperando por eles lá, junto com os antigos membros de Raimon que deixaram a equipe devido a ferimentos. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E64

programme.title: 2010. Mesmo tendo perdido 2 pontos no primeiro tempo, Raimon nunca desiste e recupera 2 pontos no segundo tempo. No entanto, as coisas pioram quando os Imperadores das Trevas começam a atacar violentamente. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A equipe mais forte do mundo versão da Blizzard
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E65

programme.title: 2010. A longa luta de Raimon contra a Aliea Academy finalmente acabou, e todos estão preparados para ir para casa. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A equipe mais forte do mundo Versão Fire
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E66

programme.title: 2010. Gōenji conta a Endou e Fubuki sobre o momento em que ele deixou Raimon, então eles se lembram de suas inúmeras batalhas contra a Aliea Academy, treinando, encontrando novos amigos e inimigos. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: O Encontro De quem é o Representante Japonês
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E67

programme.title: 2010. A maior competição da história, a Football Frontier International, está aqui. Jogadores de todo o mundo está de olho nele, buscando o melhor do mundo. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E68

programme.title: 2010. O jogo começará, decidindo quem representará o Japão. Durante toda a partida, os jogadores apelam ferozmente para serem escolhidos para a equipe nacional. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E69

programme.title: 2010. O Inazuma Japão iniciou seus treinamentos com o treinador Kudou. No entanto, eles logo perceberão que ele é um treinador rigoroso. Eles começam a se preocupar ainda mais quando sabem do passado dele. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E70

programme.title: 2010. Não importa o que Endou e os outros façam, o treinador Kudou não os deixará deixar o prédio onde estão hospedados. Mas, por alguma razão, deixe Toramaru ir para casa. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E71

programme.title: 2010. A partida entre Inazuma Japão e Big Waves continua, mas com um ponto na liderança favoreceu as ondas grandes. Kidou Yuuto finalmente rompe a tática hissatsu. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.sub-title: A luta escaldante contra os leões do deserto
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E72

programme.title: 2010. O próximo jogo do Inazuma Japão é contra o time do Catar, o Desert Lion. Tudo parece estar bem, já que o primeiro semestre termina com o Japão com dois pontos de vantagem. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E73

programme.title: 2010. Enquanto a partida continua, os jogadores do Inazuma Japan caem no calor um após o outro. Até Kidou tem que mudar devido a uma lesão. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E74

programme.title: 2010. A Inazuma do Japão está treinando duro à medida que as finais da Ásia se aproximam e, com Toramaru agora mais assertivo, eles podem finalmente tirar todo o seu poder, exceto Tobitaka. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E75

programme.title: 2010. Após os dois jogos, o Inazuma Japan teve uma boa ideia de como é o nível mundial. Para avançar para o torneio mundial, eles precisarão desenvolver novas técnicas. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E76

programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E25

programme.title: 2001. Depois que Inuyasha e seus amigos param para enterrar os mortos, Sango revela a história secreta das origens da Jóia: a própria alma da sacerdotisa Midoriko. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Segredo da Jóia das Quatro Almas é Finalmente Revelado!
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E26

programme.title: 2001. Inuyasha e seus amigos descobrem uma aldeia que sacrifica crianças ao deus local da água e conhece um menino chamado Taromaru que precisa de sua ajuda. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: O Lago da Escuridão Controlado pelo Deus da Água
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T01E27

programme.title: 2001. Depois que o túnel de vento de Mirok é atingido em uma luta com um youkai, Mirok retorna ao templo onde ele foi criado por Mushin, mas nem tudo está bem por lá. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E01

programme.title: 2001. Agome e Sango falam sobre seus respectivos passados, incluindo o irmão mais novo de Sango, Kohaku. Mas Narak tem planos sinistros para com ele. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Angústia de Sango e a Vida de Kohaku
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E02

programme.title: 2001. Sango rouba a Tessaiga enquanto Inuyasha luta contra Kohaku e vai para o castelo de Narak. Ela pretende matá-lo, mas não será assim tão fácil. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Fábio Lucindo (Mirok), Fátima Noya (Sango), Leticia Quinto (Agome Higurashi), Mauro Limai (Inuyasha), Priscilla Concepcion (Shippo), Silvio Giraldi (Sesshomaru) Diretor: Yasunao Aoki
programme.sub-title: A Tessaiga Roubada e o Confronto no Castelo de Narak
programme.desc: Inuyasha - T02E03

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Love, Death and Basketball
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) consoles Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson) when she returns from her honeymoon without the groom.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Touched by a Pig
programme.desc: Steve (Steve Harvey) comforts a grieving Regina (Wendy Raquel Robinson); Cedric's Grandma Puddin' (Cedric The Entertainer) turns a beloved pet into soul food.

programme.title: City Eats: Charleston - Wild Common
programme.desc: Chef Orlando Pagán brings Puerto Rican soul and fearless creativity to one of Charleston's most exciting kitchens. His dishes break rules. Wild Common pushes fine dining into playful, emotional territory, fresh, fun, and entirely original.

programme.title: City Eats: Charleston - Kultura
programme.desc: Chef Nikko Cagalanan brings his Lola's recipes into a fine-dining space that feels intimate. With dishes like arroz caldo and red snapper curry, Kultura invites guests into a story of memory, migration, and modern expression.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Stone Nuts

programme.desc: President Skroob (Mel Brooks) pits evil Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) against Lone Starr and the half-man, half-dog Barf (John Candy).

programme.title: The Longest Yard (1974)
programme.desc: A warden (Eddie Albert) forces an ex-football star (Burt Reynolds) to lead fellow inmates in a game against the guards.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels (1988)
programme.desc: An American con man (Steve Martin) and his British rival (Michael Caine) target a soap heiress (Glenne Headly) from Cleveland on the French Riviera.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A dangerous plan begins to take shape; how much is Boyd willing to risk for the chance to get everyone home?; Fatima and Henry find themselves at two very different and disturbing crossroads; Victor helps Tabitha and Ethan prepare for the worst.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: An aging lawman (Tommy Lee Jones) reflects on his past and laments a changing world while trying to find and protect a hunter who took the cash from a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin' (2005)
programme.desc: When his world spirals out of control, a drug dealer wants to leave his violent life behind and pursue his dream of becoming a rap artist. He channels the same manic intensity to his writing as he does to dealing.

programme.title: Paid in Full (2002)
programme.desc: A dry cleaner's delivery boy becomes one of the most powerful drug dealers in the 1980s Harlem. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Gasoline Alley (2022)
programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

programme.title: Grudge Match (2013)
programme.desc: A boxing promoter (Kevin Hart) offers two rival boxers (Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone) the chance to come out of retirement for one final bout.

programme.title: Harlem Nights (1989)
programme.desc: Business partners resisting a white mobster trying to take over their nightclub in the 1930s Harlem.

programme.title: Ali (2001)
programme.desc: Muhammad Ali (Will Smith) battles Sonny Liston, Joe Frazier and George Foreman and raises controversy outside the ring.

programme.title: Dreamland (2019)
programme.desc: A teen bounty hunter is torn between helping or capturing a seductive fugitive bank robber hiding in his small town during the Great Depression.

programme.title: Kickback (2022)
programme.desc: A documentary following the decades-long crusade of investigative journalist Andrew Jennings to expose corruption inside FIFA, football's sole governing body and the largest sports organization in the world.

programme.title: Masterminds (2016)
programme.desc: An armored-car driver (Zach Galifianakis) helps a flirty co-worker (Kristen Wiig) and her friends pull off a heist, then finds himself holding the bag after they double-cross him.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victim's daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Scream 2 (1997)
programme.desc: A masked killer continues to pursue a California student (Neve Campbell) and her friends at an Ohio college.

programme.title: Scream 3 (2000)
programme.desc: Murders draw a young woman (Neve Campbell), a reporter (Courteney Cox Arquette) and an ex-policeman (David Arquette) to the set of a movie inspired by horrific events that they survived.

programme.title: Fatman (2020)
programme.desc: After receiving a lump of coal in his stocking, a disgruntled 12-year-old hires a highly skilled assassin to kill Santa Claus.

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: A former government operative comes out of retirement and uses all his extensive training to rescue his estranged daughter from a slave trade operation.

programme.title: Light of My Life (2019)
programme.desc: A man tries to protect his daughter from the dangers of the world after a devastating plague wipes out most of the female population.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Universal Soldier (1992)
programme.desc: Dead soldiers from the '60s surface in the '90s as high-tech warriors reanimated by the U.S. government.

programme.title: Danger Close (2019)
programme.desc: Australian and New Zealand soldiers face overwhelming odds as they fight for their lives during the Battle of Long Tan in Vietnam.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandora's box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Eagle Eye (2008)
programme.desc: Two strangers (Shia LaBeouf, Michelle Monaghan) become pawns of a mysterious woman who threatens their friends and family and uses technology to control their actions.

programme.title: Faster (2010)
programme.desc: A veteran cop (Billy Bob Thornton) and an assassin (Oliver Jackson-Cohen) track an ex-convict (Dwayne Johnson) who is on a mission to take revenge on his brother's killers.

programme.title: Virtuosity (1995)
programme.desc: An ex-cop doing prison time chases a virtual-reality killer from the program onto the Los Angeles streets.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers (2006)
programme.desc: Some of the servicemen who raised the U.S. flag on Mount Suribachi during the Battle of Iwo Jima at the end of World War II live to hear of their status as heroes.

programme.title: Enemy at the Gates (2001)
programme.desc: A Nazi sniper (Ed Harris) travels to Stalingrad to find and kill a Russian sharpshooter (Jude Law), the hero of the propaganda campaign of a political officer (Joseph Fiennes).

programme.title: Borrego (2022)
programme.desc: After witnessing a drug mule's plane crash in the Borrego desert, Elly is kidnapped and forced on a dangerous journey to a remote drop-off point.

programme.title: Crisis (2021)
programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her son's disappearance.

programme.title: Raging Grace (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Cusp (2021)
programme.desc: Filmmakers Parker Hill and Isabel Bethencourt share a fascinating glimpse into authentic American girlhood, where the strictures of adolescence clash with the growing desire for personal agency.

programme.title: The Lovers (2014)
programme.desc: An impossible love blooms across two time periods and continents.

programme.title: Parallel (2024)
programme.desc: Following the journey of Vanessa, a grief-stricken woman who mysteriously finds herself navigating between parallel spaces.

programme.title: Memory (2023)
programme.desc: Social worker Sylvia's structured life is blown apart when Saul follows her home from their high school reunion. Their surprise encounter profoundly impacts both of them as they open the door to the past.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life (2005)
programme.desc: Old wounds get a chance to heal when a Wyoming rancher (Robert Redford) shelters his abused daughter-in-law (Jennifer Lopez) and her child.

programme.title: The Aviator (2004)
programme.desc: During the 1930s and '40s, wealthy industrialist Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) gains fame as a movie producer, airplane designer and pilot.

programme.title: The English Patient (1996)
programme.desc: A Hungarian count's (Ralph Fiennes) fling with a British newlywed leads to tragedy in World War II North Africa.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones (Renée Zellweger) must figure out which of the two men (Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey) in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold (2001)
programme.desc: A Manhattan woman (Meg Ryan) falls in love with the 19th-century Duke of Albany (Hugh Jackman) who has stepped through a time portal.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her (1992)
programme.desc: An actress (Meryl Streep) and an author (Goldie Hawn) fight over a plastic surgeon (Bruce Willis) and the secret of eternal beauty.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: An Unfinished Life (2005)
programme.desc: Old wounds get a chance to heal when a Wyoming rancher (Robert Redford) shelters his abused daughter-in-law (Jennifer Lopez) and her child.

programme.title: Frida (2002)
programme.desc: Mexican painter Frida Kahlo (Salma Hayek) marries fellow artist Diego Rivera who shares her radical political views.

programme.title: Life During Wartime (2009)
programme.desc: Ten years after going through traumatic personal crises, three sisters still find it difficult to move on with their lives and find real happiness.

programme.title: The Aviator (2004)
programme.desc: During the 1930s and '40s, wealthy industrialist Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) gains fame as a movie producer, airplane designer and pilot.
